# Student Loans in Bankruptcy: Can You Discharge Them? (2026 Guide)
> Can you discharge student loans in bankruptcy? Learn about the Brunner test, undue hardship standard, and recent changes. Step-by-step 202...

## About
bankruptcystudentloans.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- How to File an Adversary Proceeding for Student Loan Discharge (2026) -- Student Loans: https://bankruptcystudentloans.org/adversary-proceeding.html
- The Brunner Test: How Courts Decide Student Loan Discharge -- Student Loans: https://bankruptcystudentloans.org/brunner-test.html
- Student Loans in Chapter 13 Bankruptcy (2026): https://bankruptcystudentloans.org/chapter-13-student-loans.html
- Income-Driven Repayment vs Bankruptcy for Student Loans (2026): https://bankruptcystudentloans.org/income-driven-repayment.html
- Student Loans in Bankruptcy: Can You Discharge Them? (2026 Guide): https://bankruptcystudentloans.org/
- Parent PLUS Loans in Bankruptcy -- Discharge Options (2026) -- Student Loans: https://bankruptcystudentloans.org/parent-plus.html
- Discharging Private Student Loans in Bankruptcy: https://bankruptcystudentloans.org/private-loans.html
- Student Loan Bankruptcy Changes 2024-2026 -- Student Loans: https://bankruptcystudentloans.org/recent-changes.html
- Student Loan Discharge in Bankruptcy: Brunner Test and New DOJ Guidance [2026] -- Student Loans: https://bankruptcystudentloans.org/student-loan-discharge.html
- Undue Hardship Standard for Student Loan Discharge (2026) -- Student Loans: https://bankruptcystudentloans.org/undue-hardship.html
- Student Loans & Bankruptcy FAQ -- Discharge and Hardship Options: https://bankruptcystudentloans.org/frequently-asked-questions.html
- Student Loan Repayment vs Bankruptcy Discharge -- Comparison: https://bankruptcystudentloans.org/repayment-vs-discharge.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
